calls.title: Peabody partnership: music for new media internship
calls.summary: Submission is closed and we are currently in interview stages. No interns have been announced yet; the internship placement will be in the fall for 1-2 students.
body: Partnership-focused B-lane call for student editors/compositors to cull and shape documented performances into publishable sample narratives.
Submission is closed and interviews are in progress.
No interns have been announced yet.
Internship placement will run in the fall for 1-2 students.

calls.pastOutcome: submissions closed; interview stage in progress; interns not announced yet

calls.title: dexFest General Artist
calls.summary: Quick-turn dexFest collaboration call with talks, acts, and vendor tracks.
calls.structure: this call is structured into three separate subcalls, enumerated below:

subcalls.heading: IN DEX A2024.4a: talks & discussions
body: In search of 60-minute talk proposals, whether self-directed or group presentation/panel.
In search of guest speakers and panel members for discussions with artists and conversations surrounding copyright and copyleft environments.

subcalls.heading: IN DEX A2024.4b: acts
body: In search of artistic acts that would work well for recording into a sample library (visuals accepted and encouraged).
Acceptable proposed media include live music acts, plays, dance performances, visual screenings, live foley, poetry recital, action painting, or otherwise documentable performance works.

subcalls.heading: IN DEX A2024.4c: vendors
body: In search of artist vendors to display and sell their works; you keep 100% commission by default.
Visual and physical media preferred. Physical space is limited; e-shop space is open.

calls.pastPrompt: dexFest open call for talks, acts, and vendors

calls.title: Generative video animations
calls.summary: Call for generative coding based visuals (no AI tooling) for collaboration release windows.
calls.pastPrompt: call for generative video animations (generative coding only, no AI)

calls.title: US Mix field recording intake
calls.summary: Quick volunteer call for US-based field recordings captured in everyday environments.
body: our first mini-call; a quick call for donated field recordings from cellphone or audio-recorder captures within the US. open indefinitely, will close once it reaches 60 submissions.

WE'RE LOOKING FOR volunteer sound recording submissions around 60 seconds in length. these samples will be grouped together and distributed in a free (approx. 1-hour) set of samples of US recordings called US Mix.
it could be a recording of a conversation, birds, ice thawing, transit systems, or daily-life sonic detail.
calls.pastPrompt: mini-dex volunteer intake for US field recordings

calls.title: Commissioned audiovisual recording proposals
calls.summary: Pilot IN DEX A call for commissioned audiovisual work proposals.
calls.pastPrompt: call for proposals for a commissioned audiovisual recording

hero.subtitle_raw: your way to join the library collection
hero.framing_raw: what it is: throughout the year, we host calls for several needs.
hero.categories_intro_raw: they are sorted into four categories:

lanes.body_raw: This category includes commissioned recordings or performances for library entries, events, or special programming.
This category is for culling, compositing, and splicing performance recordings into sample-ready releases.
This is for community feedback through polls and forums.
Mini-dex calls are quick one-off volunteer calls for collaborations with minimal time and labor.

active_call.summary_raw: Quick volunteer call for US-based field recordings captured in everyday environments.
body_raw: our first mini-call; a quick call for donated field recordings from cellphone or audio-recorder captures within the US. open indefinitely, will close once it reaches 60 submissions.

WE'RE LOOKING FOR volunteer sound recording submissions around 60 seconds in length. these samples will be grouped together and distributed in a free (approx. 1-hour) set of samples of US recordings called US Mix.
it could be a recording of a conversation, birds, ice thawing, transit systems, or daily-life sonic detail.

requirements.heading_raw: THE ONLY REQUIREMENTS are that it be:
items_raw: your own recording; we cannot accept copyrighted material that is not yours, and we do not want reposted public-domain material for this release,
a non-musical recording (city life, foley, conversation, environmental capture, etc.),
around a minute in length (excerpts welcome).
licensed under Creative Commons CC-BY 4.0 (more information here about Creative Commons licenses)
requirements.contact_raw: if you have any questions about this submission, please reach out to us at info@dexdsl.com
